---
title: "about"
subtitle: "A bit about me - Education, Experience & Skills"
title-block-banner: true
---

## {{< fa briefcase title="Current Affiliation" >}} Current Affiliation: 

I'm a Senior Data Analyst in HBF HEALTH, Perth Australia, where I'm managing, analysing and visualizing complex insurance claims data in a cloud-based environment to develop a deep dive dashboard to provide a better understanding of high claim episodes and health conditions.

## {{< fa graduation-cap title="Education" >}} Education:

I have a solid research and data analytics background in Public Health and clinical data analysis. I earned my PhD from the University of Queensland, specializing in mathematical modelling, data visualization, statistical analysis, and spatial modelling. My studies provided me with tools to address unique data challenges in the healthcare sector.

During my time at UQ, I learned coding, starting with R. The supportive R community fostered my love for the language, and I now use it regularly for data analysis and visualization.

## {{< fa history title="Work Experience" >}} Work Experience: 

I have diverse working experience,  with over 8 years of experience in data analysis, research, and statistical modelling across academia and public services, and proficient in tools such as Microsoft Fabric, SQL Server, Snowflake, R, and Python. I have a strong background in data management, analysis, and visualization, with a focus on healthcare data. My experience includes working with large datasets, developing predictive models, and creating interactive dashboards to support decision-making in the healthcare sector. I am passionate about using data to drive insights and improve health outcomes.

## {{< fa tools title="Skills" >}} Skills: 

I'm proficient in various software tools, including R, SQL, Python, PowerBI and Tableau.
